selections.name: Amelioration
selections.reason: Consistent mare who placed third last start at this track and distance on a slow track. Looks ready to peak and will be hitting the line hard.

selections.name: Continent
selections.reason: Second-up today after a fair effort first-up. Has placed over a similar distance previously and should strip fitter for this.

selections.name: Evade The Game
selections.reason: Forgive the last start effort. Was a solid second two starts back at Ipswich and can bounce back to form here.

selections.name: Violaceous
selections.reason: Ran fourth last start and gets a favorable inside draw. Can feature in the exotics with a good run in transit.

danger_horse.name: Oakfield Galaxy
danger_horse.reason: Has placed multiple times and could sneak into the finish if the pace suits.

selections.name: Murkado
selections.reason: Showed good ability on debut when third at Eagle Farm on a slow track. Will take natural improvement from that experience.

selections.name: Motivating
selections.reason: Finished fourth on debut at Doomben and has trialled well since. Looks a strong contender in this field.

selections.name: Wulfhere
selections.reason: Ran third on debut at the Gold Coast on a slow track. Gets the inside barrier and should get an economical run.

selections.name: Worththeadmission
selections.reason: Fourth on debut at Toowoomba and will benefit from that outing. Capable of measuring up.

danger_horse.name: Coastal Boom
danger_horse.reason: Resuming after a break but has trialled well recently and could show up fresh.

selections.name: Caramelfudgesundae
selections.reason: Consistent filly who ran a solid second last start at Ballina in the wet. Handles the conditions and looks perfectly placed here.

selections.name: Legal Cause
selections.reason: Recent form is sound including a close second two starts back. Will be tough to hold out.

selections.name: Jam Packed
selections.reason: Finished fourth last start and was a narrow second prior. Has the ability to figure in the finish.

selections.name: Our Brave Lini
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but showed promise last preparation. Can run a bold race fresh.

danger_horse.name: Ablesheeba
danger_horse.reason: Second run back and drops in class. Improvement likely and looks a big chance if he gains a start.

selections.name: November Air
selections.reason: Excellent run last start when second at this track and distance on a slow track. Looks ready to win.

selections.name: Linthorpe Luck
selections.reason: Won well last start at this track on heavy going. Handles the wet and can make it back-to-back wins.

selections.name: Zaher
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten into second last start at Doomben. Capable of a strong run in this grade.

selections.name: Victory Command
selections.reason: Drops in class after running fourth in a Bm70 last start. Class edge makes him a major player.

danger_horse.name: The Irish
danger_horse.reason: Resuming but has good form when fresh and gets the inside draw.

selections.name: Fifty Calibre
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start at this track and distance in the wet. Looks well placed to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Arduous
selections.reason: Won well last start at Gatton and can carry that winning form into this race.

selections.name: Better Draw
selections.reason: Finished a solid second last start and is racing in good form. A genuine threat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Forty Times
selections.reason: Forgive the last start effort. Was a close second two starts back and can bounce back here.

danger_horse.name: Cheerful Cat
danger_horse.reason: Placed third at this track and distance last start on heavy ground. Inside draw is a plus.

selections.name: Daitanna
selections.reason: Very consistent mare with back-to-back seconds. Gets the inside barrier and looks primed to break through.

selections.name: Missile One
selections.reason: Finished third last start at this track on a slow surface. Ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Unfaithful
selections.reason: Won well two starts back on a soft track. Capable of bouncing back to winning form.

selections.name: Bruckheimer
selections.reason: Forgive last start. Was a strong second two starts back on soft ground and can feature here.

danger_horse.name: Contilda's Love
danger_horse.reason: Won well last start at this track in heavy going. Must be respected on that effort.

selections.name: Kelanoa
selections.reason: Excellent second last start at this track on wet ground. Racing well and looks the one to beat despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Rustic Tzar
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and gets a favorable inside draw here. Can bounce back to his best.

selections.name: A Touch From Fayt
selections.reason: Consistent type who gets the inside barrier. Should get a great run in transit and feature in the finish.

selections.name: For Better
selections.reason: Won well two starts back at Warwick. Capable of a strong showing in this field.

danger_horse.name: Grandeur Rose
danger_horse.reason: Placed third last start and has a good draw. Can add value to exotics if she gains a start.

selections.name: Bit Of Grunt
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start at this track and distance on soft ground. Overcame a wide draw then and can do it again.

selections.name: Rubydoo
selections.reason: Finished a close second last start and is racing in great form. A major threat.

selections.name: Outakandy
selections.reason: Solid third last start and has been consistent. Will be running on strongly.

selections.name: Ionaceltic
selections.reason: Forgive the last start. Won well two starts back and can bounce back to that form here.

danger_horse.name: Echo Hunter
danger_horse.reason: Won well two starts back on heavy ground. Handles the wet and can surprise.
